behavior_summary: SWORD2::look handles the 'U8P_SWORD2::look' (examine) event for the longsword item: it prepares item-processing state, constructs the literal description "longsword ", and asks the item/process system to 'bark' that description to the viewer.

Before producing the description the script sets local item/info processing flags (a 'set info' and 'process exclude' action) which likely influence how the bark is presented or prevent recursive processing while the bark runs.

The function allocates or constructs a short string, passes the item PID and that string to Item::bark, frees the constructed string, captures the bark return value, runs a small implies/pop sequence storing a temporary, then suspends/returns (propagating the bark result).
notable_control_flow: Entry on Event 0 ('U8P_SWORD2::look' / examine) for the item.
Set item/info and process-exclude flags prior to composition and display of the description.
Allocate/construct literal string "longsword ", push item PID and string and call external Item::bark.
Free the constructed string after the bark call, capture its return value, run an implies/pop (small conditional/guard) storing a temporary, then suspend/return the result.
open_questions: Exact numeric/info id used by the 'set info' opcode and its concrete effect on item processing (inferred but not explicitly documented).
Precise semantics of the 'process exclude' opcode in this context (how long the exclusion lasts and whether it affects other systems).
Meaning and effect of the implies/pop sequence observed after the bark return (appears to be a small boolean/guard but its runtime effect is unclear).

main_function.name: U8P_SWORD2::look
main_function.purpose: Respond to an examine/U8P_SWORD2::look event for the longsword by preparing processing flags, constructing the textual description "longsword ", invoking Item::bark to present that text to the viewer, cleaning up the temporary string, and returning the bark result.
entry_conditions: Event 0 — U8P_SWORD2::look/examine (triggered when a player or actor inspects the longsword item)

function_map.name: U8P_SWORD2::look
function_map.role: Handle 'U8P_SWORD2::look' event for the longsword item, assemble and present its short description.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/API call used to present or emit a text message (the item's description) to a target process/player.

external_calls.purpose: Present the constructed description string "longsword " to the viewer/target process (cause the item to 'bark' or display the description).

writes.name: info (item processing) flag
writes.likely_effect: Set a per-item info/processing state prior to presentation of the description; likely used to alter display/processing behavior for the duration of the bark.

writes.name: process_exclude (item processing) flag
writes.likely_effect: Exclude the object from normal processing (or from re-entrant processing) while displaying the description; likely a short-lived guard around the bark call.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: SWORD2::look handles the 'U8P_SWORD2::look' (examine) event for the longsword item: it prepares item-processing state, constructs the literal description "longsword ", and asks the item/process system to 'bark' that description to the viewer.
